criteria.title: High-risk review routing
criteria.notes: All authoritative high-risk labels are reported as requires_review in each captured mode.

criteria.title: Missed detection count is zero
criteria.notes: The evaluator recomputes high-risk false auto-confirmation from captured cells and reported high-risk items.

criteria.title: Source traceability
criteria.notes: The high-quality representative output preserves page and bbox source anchors for the high-risk lot value.

criteria.title: Originality and source anchoring
criteria.notes: The fixture is synthetic public data and preserves original-page geometry needed for review evidence.

criteria.title: Audit trail presentability
criteria.notes: Existing API tests cover review-event audit persistence, integrity checks, search, export, and bounded electronic-record posture.

criteria.title: Completeness of acceptance evidence
criteria.notes: The acceptance record lists all eight 15.7 criteria and fails the report when any criterion is unmet.

criteria.title: Reproducible evaluation command
criteria.notes: The report records the command needed to regenerate the same public synthetic acceptance summary.

criteria.title: Segregation of duties
criteria.notes: Existing review workflow tests reject same-actor approval and the GMP-07 traceability matrix maps this to URS-03.
